# arenaml_basis (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `kind` (String) The kind of basis (e.g., git, s3, gcs, etc.)
- `name` (String) The unique name of the basis
- `source` (Attributes) ( required ) source config of basis to be used by both watcher to check for new version (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--source))
- `watcher` (Attributes) ( required ) watcher image and other config details, for now collector uses the same image as watcher (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--watcher))

### Optional

- `allowed_envs` (List of String) limit the execution of basis watcher & colletor to these env, if empty then only primary env is allowed
- `collector` (Attributes) collector config when artifact are fetched by a different process instead of watcher (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--collector))
- `description` (String) A description of the basis
- `frozen` (Boolean) Whether the basis is frozen
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the basis

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The timestamp when the basis was created
- `updated` (String) The timestamp when the basis was last updated
- `version` (Number) The version of the basis

<a id="nestedatt--source"></a>
### Nested Schema for `source`

Required:

- `format` (String) if empty then assumed json
- `raw` (String) template string used directly


<a id="nestedatt--watcher"></a>
### Nested Schema for `watcher`

Required:

- `image` (String) container image name

Optional:

- `env` (Map of String) env variable to set for the container image
- `no_collect` (Boolean) if true then a separate collect job will launch to get new version. To handle cases where collection can take a lot of resources and time
- `registry_auth` (Map of String) auth for registry if image is not public
- `run_spec` (String) resource and other limits along with driver override, other than docker only podman can be used for now


<a id="nestedatt--collector"></a>
### Nested Schema for `collector`

Optional:

- `bounce_duration` (String) format time.ParseDuration e.g. 1h, 30m, in case not all values needs to be collected, for e.g.
- `max_parallel` (Number) max number of concurrent collect task to run
- `max_size` (String) max size of collected artifact in datasize.ParseString format eg. 1kb, 500mb
- `run_spec` (String) misc compute resource details
- `timeout` (String) format time.ParseDuration e.g. 1h, 30m
